user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Scheduled Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected initiated for Blue Yonder Airlines.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-12 08:14 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

Our team encountered some challenges with consumption trend. Could you provide additional documentation or schedule a technical review?

---
From: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
To: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
Date: 2024-02-17 15:13 EST
Subject: Re: consumption trend Discussion - Next Steps

There's been a change in our timeline for consumption trend. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

---
From: Robert Singh <robert.singh@blueyonderai.com>
To: David Chen <david.chen@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-25 13:43 EST
Subject: Follow-up: consumption trend Review

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with consumption trend. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

Meeting: consumption trend Discussion - Blue Yonder Airlines
Date: 2024-03-13
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines), David Chen (Microsoft), Michelle (Blue Yonder Airlines)

[00:01:15] Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines): Appreciate everyone making time. The main agenda today is consumption trend.

[00:05:00] Michelle (Blue Yonder Airlines): Our CTO reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:09:00] Michelle (Blue Yonder Airlines): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:14:00] Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines): The timeline for security compliance is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:18:00] Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.

[00:20:00] David Chen (Microsoft): The timeline for partner engagement is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:23:00] Michelle (Blue Yonder Airlines): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around integration complexity.

[00:25:00] Robert Singh (Blue Yonder Airlines): On the consumption trend front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around vendor dependencies.

[00:28:00] David Chen (Microsoft): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about security compliance. Can we address those?
